display.purpose: Home/error page titles only; PT Serif, fluid clamp.

headline.purpose: Doc H1, PT Serif 700, 2px bottom border.

title.purpose: Doc H2 and sidebar title, PT Serif 700.

body.purpose: Inter running text and UI, capped at 72ch on prose.

label.purpose: Consolas uppercase meta labels and badges.

shadows.name: soft
shadows.purpose: Quiet warm-tinted lift for popovers; near-black at night (rgba(0,0,0,0.35)).

shadows.name: modal
shadows.purpose: Deep lift under the search results listbox; the one floating surface. Night: rgba(0,0,0,0.5).

motion.name: ease-out
motion.purpose: Ease-out-quart; interactive transitions leave fast, settle soft.

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Default transition duration for color/opacity/border-color state changes.

components.name: Search Combobox
components.description: Header type-ahead: bordered input group that warms its border on focus and drops a lifted listbox.
components.html: /
components.css: .ds-search { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; width: 320px; height: 34px; padding: 0 10px; background: var(--input-bg); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--radius-sm); transition: border-color 0.15s var(--ease-out); } .ds-search:focus-within { border-color: var(--accent); } .ds-search-icon { flex-shrink: 0; color: var(--text-soft); } .ds-search-input { flex: 1; min-width: 0; border: 0; background: transparent; color: var(--text); font-family: inherit; font-size: 0.875rem; outline: none; } .ds-search-input::placeholder { color: var(--text-soft); opacity: 1; } .ds-search-kbd { font-family: var(--font-mono); font-size: 0.7rem; line-height: 1; color: var(--text-soft); border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: 3px; padding: 2px 5px; }

components.name: Section Row
components.description: The primary grouping affordance: a bordered list row with a pioneer-red arrow that fades in on hover.
components.html: • ГлоссарийТермины движка RenPy и модов БЛ→
components.css: .ds-rows { list-style: none; margin: 0; padding: 0; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); } .ds-rows li { border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); } .ds-row { display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 20px; padding: 16px 0; text-decoration: none; color: inherit; } .ds-row-name { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); transition: color 0.15s var(--ease-out); } .ds-row-desc { font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--text-soft); flex: 1; } .ds-row-arrow { font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--accent); opacity: 0; transition: opacity 0.15s var(--ease-out); } .ds-row:hover .ds-row-name, .ds-row:focus-visible .ds-row-name { color: var(--accent); } .ds-row:hover .ds-row-arrow, .ds-row:focus-visible .ds-row-arrow { opacity: 1; }

components.name: Info Callout
components.description: Calm sky-blue note block: paired hairlines + faint gradient band, 32px currentColor icon. No side-stripe.
components.html: Примечание. Это информационный блок.
components.css: .ds-info { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 16px; margin: 32px 0; color: var(--info); border-top: 1px solid var(--info); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--info); background: linear-gradient(0deg, var(--info-bg) 5%, var(--info-bg1) 25%, var(--info-bg1) 75%, var(--info-bg) 95%); } .ds-info-icon { width: 32px; height: 32px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-info-body { color: var(--text); } .ds-info-body strong { color: var(--info); }

components.name: Warning Callout
components.description: Deeper-red caution block, same structure as info so the two read as a matched pair.
components.html: Внимание. Это предупреждение.
components.css: .ds-warn { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 16px; margin: 32px 0; color: var(--warning); border-top: 1px solid var(--warning); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--warning); background: linear-gradient(0deg, var(--warning-bg) 5%, var(--warning-bg1) 25%, var(--warning-bg1) 75%, var(--warning-bg) 95%); } .ds-warn-icon { width: 32px; height: 32px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-warn-body { color: var(--text); } .ds-warn-body strong { color: var(--warning); }

components.name: Nav Link
components.description: Full-height sticky-header link; ink-soft at rest, inset pioneer-red underline when current.
components.html: ДокументацияАвторы
components.css: .ds-nav { display: inline-flex; align-items: stretch; min-height: 52px; } .ds-nav-link { display: flex; align-items: center; padding-inline: 16px; font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--text-soft); text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.15s var(--ease-out); } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: var(--text); } .ds-nav-link[aria-current="page"] { color: var(--text); box-shadow: inset 0 -2px 0 var(--accent); } .ds-nav-link:focus-visible { color: var(--text); outline: 2px solid var(--accent); outline-offset: -3px; border-radius: 2px; }

narrative.overview: ES Doc is a field manual for Russian-speaking modders of Everlasting Summer. The whole system lives inside the game's own light: warm afternoon sun on a sand path by day, the deep blue of the lake at camp by night. It should feel like a senior modder left you good notes, warm enough to trust and precise enough to ship from. The theme is genuinely bimodal: light is the default (prefers-color-scheme chooses), dark is the night scene by the lake. Code panels are the deliberate exception, staying film-warm-dark in both modes.
keyCharacteristics: Warm-tinted neutrals only; never pure #000 or #fff.
Pioneer red is a once-per-screen spotlight, not a fill.
PT Serif carries the warmth in headings; Inter carries the body; Consolas signals meta and code.
Flat by default; the one shadow is the search popover lifting off the page.
Light and dark are equal citizens, switched by ambient preference.

rules.name: The Galstuk Rule
rules.body: Pioneer red appears on ≤10% of any screen. Its rarity is the point; emphasis inside a red-tinted surface leans on weight, not more red.

rules.name: The Warm-Dark Panel Rule
rules.body: Code panels stay #241B12/#12161E in both themes; the syntax palette is verified ≥4.5:1 on those backgrounds, so there is no separate dark override.

rules.name: The No Pure Neutral Rule
rules.body: Never #000 or #fff, and never an untinted gray. Prefer the token over any literal hex that has one.

rules.name: The Serif-Carries-Warmth Rule
rules.body: Headings are ink-colored, not accent-colored. PT Serif carries the warmth so pioneer red stays a spotlight.

rules.name: The Three-Weight Rule
rules.body: Only 400, 600, and 700 exist. Weight 500 was removed; do not reintroduce it.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. A shadow appears only when an element leaves the page plane; today that is the search popover alone.

dos: Do reach for the token (var(--ink), var(--border), var(--accent), var(--info)), never a literal hex that has a token.
Do define both a light :root value and a prefers-color-scheme: dark value for every new color token.
Do keep pioneer red to a once-per-screen spotlight; use weight or size for emphasis inside warm surfaces.
Do keep code panels warm-dark in both themes.
Do use PT Serif for headings/quotes, Inter for body/UI, Consolas for meta labels and code, at weights 400/600/700 only.
Do pair every callout icon with class="icon" and currentColor so it inherits the semantic color and the 32px size.
Do use тире (—, U+2014) as the Russian title separator and nested-list marker, overriding the English no-em-dash default.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion: disable both transitions and keyframe animations.
donts: Don't ship the sterile ReadTheDocs / Sphinx look, the corporate gray of a Confluence wiki, or neon/cyberpunk gaming aesthetics.
Don't use #000, #fff, or any untinted gray.
Don't use border-left/border-right wider than 1px as a colored accent stripe (the sidebar's 1px structural indent is the only exception).
Don't add drop shadows to cards, rows, or callouts; the search popover is the only floating surface.
Don't color headings with pioneer red.
Don't reintroduce font-weight 500, or a display font in UI labels/data.
Don't replace тире (—) in Russian copy with a colon, pipe, or middle dot.
